name: Update Product Details Performance Test
description: Validate system performance and stability when updating product details using a full replace operation under concurrent load.
preconditions: Product IDs used during testing must already exist.
A test database snapshot with known product IDs should be prepared.
Authentication token must be included in request headers (Authorization: Bearer <token>).

input data.type of load: Concurrent load test simulating 30 concurrent PUT operations

metrics.target value: Updates must reflect in subsequent GET requests

notes: Ensure the same product is not overwritten in conflicting ways during concurrency tests unless intentional. Validate updates through follow-up GET requests.
